name: Moist Chocolate Cake (English)
recipeIngredient: Water or milk to mix, if required
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C) or Mark 4.
2. Grease and line two 8-inch sandwich tins with parchment paper.
3. In a bowl, sift together the self-rising flour and drinking chocolate.
4. Cream the margarine and caster sugar in another bowl until light and fluffy.
5. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, adding a tablespoon of the flour mixture to prevent curdling.
6. Fold in the remaining flour and chocolate mixture, then stir in the hot water.
7. Divide the batter evenly between the prepared tins and smooth the tops with a spatula.
8. Bake for 25 minutes or until the surface springs back when pressed lightly.
9. Remove the cakes from the tins and cool on wire racks.
Filling:
1. Prepare the buttercream filling by mixing all ingredients together until smooth and light in consistency.
2. Spread the buttercream over one of the cooled cake layers.
3. Sandwich the filled cake layer with another layer of cake, if desired.
Icing:
1. Mix the icing sugar and drinking chocolate with water to form a thick paste.
2. Brush the paste evenly over the top of the cake before serving.
